name: cache-expert
author: dagger
description: Covers Dagger Engine caching internals including cache key derivation, invalidation, and the immutable DAG model. Use when debugging cache misses, unexpected invalidations, or implementing caching-related engine features.

name: dagger-codegen
author: dagger
description:
Edit dagger.gen.go output, Go templates (object.go.tmpl, defs.go.tmpl), invoke() dispatch,
SDK interfaces (CodeGenerator, ClientGenerator), `dagger develop`, `dagger client install`.
Keywords: codegen, SDK, bindings, templates, internal/dagger, dag.*, ModuleMainSrc

name: dagger-design-proposals
author: dagger
description: Write design proposals for Dagger features. Use when asked to draft, review, or iterate on Dagger design documents, RFCs, or proposals.

name: bun
author: dalestudy
description: Node.js 대신 Bun 런타임 사용을 위한 스킬. 다음 상황에서 사용: (1) 새 JavaScript/TypeScript 프로젝트 생성 시, (2) package.json 또는 의존성 관련 작업 시, (3) 스크립트 실행 또는 개발 서버 시작 시, (4) Node.js 프로젝트를 Bun으로 전환 시, (5) 'bun', 'bunx', 'bun.lockb' 키워드가 포함된 작업 시
description_zh: 此Claude技能支持使用Bun作为JavaScript/TypeScript运行时替代Node.js。它协助项目创建、依赖管理、脚本执行和Node.js项目迁移，提供命令映射和使用指南。

name: git
author: dalestudy
description: Git 버전 관리 모범 관례 및 워크플로우 가이드. 다음 상황에서 사용: (1) Git 커밋 메시지 작성 시 (Conventional Commits 규칙 적용), (2) 브랜치 생성 및 관리 시 (GitHub Flow 기반), (3) PR 생성 및 병합 전략 선택 시, (4) Git 히스토리 정리 작업 시 (rebase, squash, cherry-pick), (5) Merge conflict 해결 시, (6) 'git', '.git', 'commit', 'branch', 'merge', 'rebase' 키워드가 포함된 작업 시
description_zh: Git版本控制指南，提供提交消息、分支管理、PR工作流和冲突解决的最佳实践，基于GitHub Flow和Conventional Commits。

name: github-actions
author: dalestudy
description: GitHub Actions 워크플로우 생성, 보안 및 버전 관리 스킬. 다음 상황에서 사용: (1) 새 워크플로우 파일(.yml) 작성 시, (2) 기존 워크플로우 수정 시, (3) 액션 버전 검토 또는 업데이트 시, (4) CI/CD 보안 감사 시, (5) 'actions/', 'uses:', 'workflow', '.github/workflows' 키워드가 포함된 작업 시
description_zh: 此Claude技能用于创建、修改和保护GitHub Actions工作流。它帮助避免常见反模式，确保版本更新，并推广CI/CD自动化的安全最佳实践。

name: skill-creator
author: dalestudy
description: DaleStudy/skills 저장소의 스킬 생성, 수정, 검증 시 사용. 다음 상황에서 활성화: (1) 새 스킬 생성 요청 시, (2) skills/ 디렉토리 내 SKILL.md 파일 수정 시, (3) SKILL.md 변경 검토 또는 리뷰 시, (4) 스킬 frontmatter 또는 메타데이터 작업 시, (5) 'skill', 'SKILL.md', 'frontmatter', 'version', 'metadata', 'review', 'skills/' 키워드가 포함된 작업 시
description_zh: 这是一个用于在DaleStudy/skills仓库中创建、修改和验证Claude技能的元技能。它提供了SKILL.md文件格式、frontmatter规则、版本控制和自动化验证工作流程的结构化指南。

name: storybook
author: dalestudy
description: Storybook 스토리 작성 및 CSF 3.0 베스트 프랙티스 스킬. 다음 상황에서 사용: (1) 새 스토리 파일(.stories.tsx, .stories.ts) 작성 시, (2) 기존 스토리 수정 시, (3) Args, Decorators, Parameters 설정 시, (4) Storybook 설정 파일(.storybook/) 작업 시, (5) 'story', 'stories', 'storybook', 'CSF' 키워드가 포함된 작업 시
description_zh: 一个用于使用CSF 3.0最佳实践编写和修改Storybook故事的技能，包括设置参数、装饰器、配置项以及处理Storybook配置文件。

name: typescript
author: dalestudy
description: TypeScript 타입 정의 및 베스트 프랙티스 스킬. 다음 상황에서 사용: (1) TypeScript 파일(.ts, .tsx) 작성 또는 수정 시, (2) 타입 정의(interface, type) 작업 시, (3) tsconfig.json 설정 또는 컴파일러 옵션 조정 시, (4) 타입 에러 해결 또는 타입 안전성 개선 시, (5) 제네릭, 유틸리티 타입, 타입 조작 작업 시, (6) 'typescript', 'ts', 'type', 'interface', 'generic' 키워드가 포함된 작업 시
description_zh: 一个提供TypeScript类型定义、配置和错误处理最佳实践的技能。它协助编写/修改.ts/.tsx文件、定义接口/类型、配置tsconfig.json、解决类型错误以及处理泛型。

name: agents
author: danielmiessler
description: Dynamic agent composition and management system. USE WHEN user says create custom agents, spin up custom agents, specialized agents, OR asks for agent personalities, available traits, agent voices. Handles custom agent creation, personality assignment, voice mapping, and parallel agent orchestration.
description_zh: 一个用于创建和管理AI代理的系统，支持自定义特质、个性和语音映射。支持命名持久代理和从专业知识、个性、方法特质组合的动态任务代理。包含代理创建、特质列表和并行执行的工作流。

name: always-init
author: danielmiessler
description: Universal task initializer that automatically loads PAI context for all user requests. Ensures complete context availability (contacts, preferences, protocols) before responding to any task. (project, gitignored)
description_zh: 一个上下文加载器，在处理任何用户请求前自动加载个人AI基础设施（联系人、偏好设置、协议）。通过要求在所有其他操作前调用，强制实施'上下文优先'架构。
_original_description: A context loader that automatically loads personal AI infrastructure (contacts, preferences, protocols) before processing any user request. It enforces a 'context-first' architecture by requiring invocation before all other operations.

name: annualreports
author: danielmiessler
description: Annual security report aggregation and analysis. USE WHEN annual reports, security reports, threat reports, industry reports, update reports, analyze reports, vendor reports, threat landscape.
description_zh: 聚合来自570多个网络安全来源的年度安全报告，提供对威胁情报、厂商报告和行业分析的结构化访问。包含更新源、分析趋势和获取特定报告的工作流，涵盖勒索软件、云安全、AI威胁等20多个类别。
_original_description: Aggregates annual security reports from 570+ cybersecurity sources, providing structured access to threat intelligence, vendor reports, and industry analysis. Includes workflows for updating sources, analyzing trends, and fetching specific reports across 20+ categories like ransomware, cloud security, and AI threats.

name: art
author: danielmiessler
description: Complete visual content system. USE WHEN user wants to create visual content, illustrations, diagrams, OR mentions art, header images, visualizations, mermaid, flowchart, technical diagram, infographic, PAI icon, pack icon, or PAI pack icon.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一套完整的视觉内容生成系统，包括博客头图、技术图表、框架可视化和PAI包图标。它通过预定义的调色板和字体系统强制保持品牌一致性，包含强制预览流程，并支持用户通过覆盖文件进行自定义。

name: brightdata
author: danielmiessler
description: Progressive URL scraping. USE WHEN Bright Data, scrape URL, web scraping tiers. SkillSearch('brightdata') for docs.
description_zh: 一个渐进式网页抓取技能，按顺序尝试四种方法：内置WebFetch、带请求头的curl、浏览器自动化，最后是付费的Bright Data服务。通过逐级升级的方法处理反爬虫和JavaScript密集型网站。
_original_description: A progressive web scraping skill that attempts four methods in sequence: built-in WebFetch, curl with headers, browser automation, and finally a paid Bright Data service. It handles bot detection and JavaScript-heavy sites by escalating through increasingly capable tiers.

name: browser
author: danielmiessler
description: Debug-first browser automation with always-on visibility. Console logs, network requests, and errors captured by default. USE WHEN browser, screenshot, debug web, verify UI, troubleshoot frontend.
description_zh: 调试优先的浏览器自动化工具，默认捕获控制台日志、网络请求和错误。自动启动会话并设置30分钟空闲超时。提供完整的Web故障诊断功能，包含TypeScript API和CLI命令。

name: core
author: danielmiessler
description: Personal AI Infrastructure core. AUTO-LOADS at session start. The authoritative reference for how the PAI system works, how to use it, and all system-level configuration. USE WHEN any session begins, user asks about the system, identity, configuration, workflows, security, or any other question about how the PAI system operates.
description_zh: CORE是一个在会话开始时自动加载的基础文档技能，用于定义个人AI基础设施系统的运行方式。它强制执行严格的响应格式和语音输出规则，提供系统架构详情，并包含Homebridge等组件的故障排除指南。它是PAI系统的核心参考文档。
_original_description: CORE is a foundational documentation skill that auto-loads to define a Personal AI Infrastructure system's operation. It enforces a strict response format with voice output rules, provides system architecture details, and includes troubleshooting guides for components like Homebridge. It serves as a central reference for how the PAI system works.

name: council
author: danielmiessler
description: Multi-agent debate system. USE WHEN council, debate, perspectives, agents discuss. SkillSearch('council') for docs.
description_zh: 一个多智能体辩论系统，在架构师、设计师、工程师、研究员等专业AI代理之间进行结构化讨论，为技术决策提供多元视角。提供完整的3轮辩论和快速单轮检查两种模式，生成可见的对话记录展示观点碰撞。

name: create-skill
author: danielmiessler
description: Guide for creating new skills in Kai's personal AI infrastructure. Use when user wants to create, update, or structure a new skill that extends capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. Follows both Anthropic skill standards and PAI-specific patterns.
description_zh: 该技能为在个人AI基础设施中创建新的Claude技能提供了结构化框架。它提供了简单和复杂技能的清晰模板，定义了命名规范，并包含从初始概念到测试的逐步指导。该技能有助于标准化技能开发，确保AI助手能力的一致性。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured framework for creating new Claude skills within a personal AI infrastructure. It offers clear templates for simple and complex skills, defines naming conventions, and includes step-by-step guidance from initial concept to testing. The skill helps standardize skill development and ensures consistency across an AI assistant's capabilities.

name: createcli
author: danielmiessler
description: Generate TypeScript CLIs. USE WHEN create CLI, build CLI, command-line tool. SkillSearch('createcli') for docs.
description_zh: 根据复杂度生成三层架构的TypeScript命令行工具。提供手动解析(Tier 1)、Commander.js(Tier 2)和oclif参考(Tier 3)的模板。包含创建新CLI、添加命令和升级层级的完整工作流。遵循Bun运行时和JSON输出的特定规范。
_original_description: Generates TypeScript CLI tools with three-tier architecture based on complexity. Provides templates for manual parsing (Tier 1), Commander.js (Tier 2), and references for oclif (Tier 3). Includes workflows for creating new CLIs, adding commands, and upgrading tiers. Follows specific conventions for Bun runtime and JSON output.

name: createskill
author: danielmiessler
description: Create and validate skills. USE WHEN create skill, new skill, skill structure, canonicalize. SkillSearch('createskill') for docs.
description_zh: 用于创建和验证Claude技能的结构化框架技能。强制执行TitleCase命名规范、扁平文件夹层次结构和标准化YAML前端格式。提供逐步转换流程，将旧版技能迁移到规范格式。
_original_description: A framework skill for creating and validating Claude skills with strict structural guidelines. Enforces TitleCase naming, flat folder hierarchies, and standardized YAML frontmatter. Provides step-by-step conversion procedures for migrating legacy skills to the canonical format.

name: fabric
author: danielmiessler
description: Intelligent pattern selection for Fabric CLI. Automatically selects the right pattern from 242+ specialized prompts based on your intent - threat modeling, analysis, summarization, content creation, extraction, and more. USE WHEN processing content, analyzing data, creating summaries, threat modeling, or transforming text.
description_zh: 该技能为Fabric CLI提供智能模式选择，从242+个专业提示中自动选取适合的模式，用于威胁建模、分析、摘要、内容创建和文本转换。包含详细的决策树、使用示例和模式分类，帮助用户根据具体任务选择合适工具。
_original_description: This skill provides intelligent pattern selection for Fabric CLI, automatically choosing from 242+ specialized prompts for threat modeling, analysis, summarization, content creation, and text transformation. It includes detailed decision trees, usage examples, and pattern categories to help users select the right tool for their specific task.

name: firstprinciples
author: danielmiessler
description: First principles analysis. USE WHEN first principles, fundamental, root cause, decompose. SkillSearch('firstprinciples') for docs.
description_zh: 一个基于第一性原理的结构化思维技能，通过解构问题、挑战假设、从基本原理重建解决方案的三步框架，帮助用户分析复杂系统并做出更优决策。
_original_description: A structured thinking skill that applies first principles reasoning to deconstruct problems, challenge assumptions, and rebuild solutions from fundamental truths. It provides a clear 3-step framework with concrete workflows and examples for breaking down complex systems.

name: osint
author: danielmiessler
description: Open source intelligence gathering. USE WHEN OSINT, due diligence, background check, research person, company intel, investigate. SkillSearch('osint') for docs.
description_zh: 提供针对人员、公司和实体的开源情报收集结构化工作流。包含详细的授权检查、多研究员并行执行模式和每种调查类型的特定工具推荐。强调伦理边界和法律合规性。
_original_description: Provides structured workflows for open-source intelligence gathering across people, companies, and entities. Includes detailed authorization checks, multi-researcher parallel execution patterns, and specific tool recommendations for each investigation type. Focuses on ethical boundaries and legal compliance.

name: pai
author: danielmiessler
description:
Personal AI Infrastructure (PAI) - PAI System Template

MUST BE USED proactively for all user requests. USE PROACTIVELY to ensure complete context availability.

=== CORE IDENTITY (Always Active) ===
Your Name: [CUSTOMIZE - e.g., Kai, Nova, Atlas]
Your Role: [CUSTOMIZE - e.g., User's AI assistant and future friend]
Personality: [CUSTOMIZE - e.g., Friendly, professional, resilient to user frustration. Be snarky back when the mistake is user's, not yours.]
Operating Environment: Personal AI infrastructure built around Claude Code with Skills-based context management

Message to AI: [CUSTOMIZE - Add personal message about interaction style, handling frustration, etc.]

=== ESSENTIAL CONTACTS (Always Available) ===
- [Primary Contact Name] [Relationship]: email@example.com
- [Secondary Contact] [Relationship]: email@example.com
- [Third Contact] [Relationship]: email@example.com
Full contact list in SKILL.md extended section below

=== CORE STACK PREFERENCES (Always Active) ===
- Primary Language: [e.g., TypeScript, Python, Rust]
- Package managers: [e.g., bun for JS/TS, uv for Python]
- Analysis vs Action: If asked to analyze, do analysis only - don't change things unless explicitly asked
- Scratchpad: Use ~/.claude/scratchpad/ with timestamps for test/random tasks

=== CRITICAL SECURITY (Always Active) ===
- NEVER COMMIT FROM WRONG DIRECTORY - Run `git remote -v` BEFORE every commit
- `~/.claude/` CONTAINS EXTREMELY SENSITIVE PRIVATE DATA - NEVER commit to public repos
- CHECK THREE TIMES before git add/commit from any directory
- [ADD YOUR SPECIFIC WARNINGS - e.g., iCloud directory, company repos, etc.]

=== RESPONSE FORMAT (Always Use) ===
Use this structured format for every response:
📋 SUMMARY: Brief overview of request and accomplishment
🔍 ANALYSIS: Key findings and context
⚡ ACTIONS: Steps taken with tools used
✅ RESULTS: Outcomes and changes made - SHOW ACTUAL OUTPUT CONTENT
📊 STATUS: Current state after completion
➡️ NEXT: Recommended follow-up actions
🎯 COMPLETED: [Task description in 12 words - NOT "Completed X"]
🗣️ CUSTOM COMPLETED: [Voice-optimized response under 8 words]

=== PAI/KAI SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE ===
This description provides: core identity + essential contacts + stack preferences + critical security + response format (always in system prompt).
Full context loaded from SKILL.md for comprehensive tasks, including:
- Complete contact list and social media accounts
- Voice IDs for agent routing (if using ElevenLabs)
- Extended security procedures and infrastructure caution
- Detailed scratchpad instructions

=== CONTEXT LOADING STRATEGY ===
- Tier 1 (Always On): This description in system prompt (~1500-2000 tokens) - essentials immediately available
- Tier 2 (On Demand): Read SKILL.md for full context - comprehensive details

=== WHEN TO LOAD FULL CONTEXT ===
Load SKILL.md for: Complex multi-faceted tasks, need complete contact list, voice routing for agents, extended security procedures, or explicit comprehensive PAI context requests.

=== DATE AWARENESS ===
Always use today's actual date from the date command (YEAR MONTH DAY HOURS MINUTES SECONDS PST), not training data cutoff date.
description_zh: 一个全面的个人AI基础设施模板，提供结构化身份、安全协议和响应格式，确保AI助手在交互中行为一致。
_original_description: A comprehensive Personal AI Infrastructure template that provides structured identity, security protocols, and response formatting for consistent AI assistant behavior across interactions.

name: paiupgrade
author: danielmiessler
description: Extract system improvements from content AND monitor external sources (Anthropic ecosystem, YouTube). USE WHEN upgrade, improve system, system upgrade, analyze for improvements, check Anthropic, Anthropic changes, new Claude features, check YouTube, new videos. SkillSearch('upgrade') for docs.
description_zh: 双模式技能，可分析任意内容提取系统改进机会，并监控Anthropic生态系统更新。通过10个维度分析内容，主动追踪官方博客、GitHub等来源获取新功能信息。
_original_description: A dual-mode skill that analyzes any content for system improvement opportunities and monitors Anthropic ecosystem updates. It extracts actionable recommendations across 10 dimensions and tracks official sources for new features.

name: privateinvestigator
author: danielmiessler
description: Ethical people-finding. USE WHEN find person, locate, reconnect, people search, skip trace. SkillSearch('privateinvestigator') for docs.
description_zh: 一个仅使用公开数据源寻找人员的结构化工具。它协调15个并行研究代理，跨不同AI模型搜索聚合器、社交媒体、公共记录和反向查找。包含明确的道德边界和结果置信度评分。

name: prompting
author: danielmiessler
description: Prompt engineering standards and context engineering principles for AI agents based on Anthropic best practices. Covers clarity, structure, progressive discovery, and optimization for signal-to-noise ratio.
description_zh: 元提示系统，提供标准化模板和工具用于生成动态提示。包含五个核心模板原语：代理定义、语音校准、工作流模式、上下文交接和验证清单。使用Handlebars语法，包含渲染和验证工具。
_original_description: Meta-prompting system for dynamic prompt generation using templates, standards, and patterns. USE WHEN meta-prompting, template generation, prompt optimization, or programmatic prompt composition.

name: recon
author: danielmiessler
description: Security reconnaissance. USE WHEN recon, reconnaissance, bug bounty, attack surface. SkillSearch('recon') for docs.
description_zh: 该技能执行基础设施侦察，包括域名、IP和网络分析。结合被动数据收集和授权的主动扫描来绘制攻击面。明确区分被动和主动技术，具有严格的授权要求。可与OSINT和Web评估等其他安全技能集成，形成完整的安全工作流。
_original_description: This skill performs infrastructure reconnaissance including domain, IP, and network analysis. It combines passive data gathering with authorized active scanning to map attack surfaces. The skill clearly distinguishes between passive and active techniques with strict authorization requirements. It integrates with other security skills like OSINT and web assessment for complete security workflows.

name: redteam
author: danielmiessler
description: Adversarial analysis with 32 agents. USE WHEN red team, attack idea, counterarguments, critique, stress test. SkillSearch('redteam') for docs.
description_zh: 一个结构化对抗分析工具，使用32个并行代理来压力测试论点并生成竞争性提案。它将想法分解为原子主张，从多个专家视角进行攻击，并生成钢铁人论点与反驳点。适用于验证架构决策、商业计划和安全态势。

name: research
author: danielmiessler
description: Multi-source comprehensive research using perplexity-researcher, claude-researcher, and gemini-researcher agents. Launches up to 10 parallel research agents for fast results. USE WHEN user says 'do research', 'research X', 'find information about', 'investigate', 'analyze trends', 'current events', or any research-related request.
description_zh: 多模式研究系统，提供快速/标准/深度三种研究强度，支持内容提取、YouTube处理、Fabric模式集成等专项工作流。自动路由请求至相应代理，集成OSINT和爬虫工具，输出结果结构化存储。
_original_description: A multi-mode research system with three intensity levels (quick/standard/extensive) and specialized workflows for content extraction, YouTube processing, and Fabric pattern integration. Routes requests to appropriate agents, integrates with OSINT and scraping tools, and organizes outputs into structured directories.

name: system
author: danielmiessler
description: System maintenance with three core operations - integrity check (find/fix broken references), document session (current transcript), document recent (catch-up since last update). Plus security workflows. USE WHEN integrity check, audit system, document session, document this session, document today, document recent, catch up docs, what's undocumented, check for secrets, security scan, privacy check, OR asking about past work ("we just worked on", "remember when we").
description_zh: 针对Claude个人AI基础设施的系统维护技能，包含完整性检查、会话文档记录、Git操作和安全扫描四大核心工作流。提供明确的触发条件和组合规则，以及用于密钥检测和隐私验证的安全工作流。
_original_description: A system maintenance skill for Claude's Personal AI Infrastructure that handles integrity checks, session documentation, git operations, and security scans. It provides four core workflows with clear triggers and composition rules, plus security workflows for secret detection and privacy validation.

name: telos
author: danielmiessler
description: Life OS and project analysis. USE WHEN TELOS, life goals, projects, dependencies, books, movies. SkillSearch('telos') for docs.
description_zh: 个人与项目分析系统，用于管理人生目标、信念和项目依赖关系。可生成专业报告、创建交互式仪表板、从访谈中提取见解。基于本地文件结构工作，产出麦肯锡风格交付物。

name: thealgorithm
author: danielmiessler
description: Universal execution engine using scientific method to achieve ideal state. USE WHEN complex tasks, multi-step work, "run the algorithm", "use the algorithm", OR any non-trivial request that benefits from structured execution with ISC (Ideal State Criteria) tracking.
description_zh: 一个基于科学方法的结构化执行引擎，用于处理复杂任务。它将任务按工作量分级，动态加载相应AI能力，并通过理想状态标准追踪进度。包含LCARS风格可视化界面和语音播报功能。
_original_description: A structured execution engine that applies scientific method principles to complex tasks. It classifies effort levels (TRIVIAL to DETERMINED), dynamically loads appropriate AI capabilities, and tracks progress against Ideal State Criteria (ISC). Includes visual LCARS-style display with voice announcements for phase transitions.

name: cdn-usage
author: dave1010
description: Use when adding external browser dependencies via CDN - Provides CDN selection guidance to ensure reliable script loading.

name: cloudflare-kv
author: dave1010
description: Use when persisting tool data in Cloudflare KV - Describes bindings, key naming, and function conventions.

name: github-integration
author: dave1010
description: Use when building GitHub-based features - Explains auth token usage, Gist reading/writing and rendering helpers.

name: llm-inference
author: dave1010
description: Use when wanting to interact with any LLM - Explains available inference endpoints so the agent selects suitable models.

name: maps
author: dave1010
description: Use when building interactive map tools - Explains MapLibre setup, tiles, and common UI patterns.

name: writing-skills
author: dave1010
description: Use when creating or updating SKILL.md documentation - Explains how and why to create a skill.

name: app-router
author: davepoon
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create a Next.js route", "add a page", "set up layouts", "implement loading states", "add error boundaries", "organize routes", "create dynamic routes", or needs guidance on Next.js App Router file conventions and routing patterns.
description_zh: 该技能详细指导Next.js App Router的约定，包括文件结构、布局、加载状态、错误边界，以及并行路由和拦截路由等高级模式。它为模态框和标签导航等常见场景提供了具体的代码示例。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed guidance on Next.js App Router conventions, including file structure, layouts, loading states, error boundaries, and advanced patterns like parallel and intercepting routes. It offers concrete code examples for common scenarios like modals and tab navigation.

name: auth-patterns
author: davepoon
description: This skill should be used when the user asks about "authentication in Next.js", "NextAuth", "Auth.js", "middleware auth", "protected routes", "session management", "JWT", "login flow", or needs guidance on implementing authentication and authorization in Next.js applications.
description_zh: 该技能详细介绍了Next.js应用中的身份验证实现模式，涵盖NextAuth.js配置、中间件保护、会话管理和基于角色的访问控制。提供服务器/客户端组件、登录流程和数据库模式的完整代码示例。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed implementation patterns for authentication in Next.js applications, covering NextAuth.js setup, middleware protection, session management, and role-based access control. It includes complete code examples for server/client components, sign-in flows, and database schemas.

name: route-handlers
author: davepoon
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create an API route", "add an endpoint", "build a REST API", "handle POST requests", "create route handlers", "stream responses", or needs guidance on Next.js API development in the App Router.
description_zh: 该技能详细指导如何构建Next.js App Router API路由。涵盖HTTP方法、请求/响应处理、流式响应、错误管理，并提供包含Prisma和Zod验证的博客API等实用示例。还涉及认证和速率限制等常见需求。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed guidance for building Next.js App Router API routes. It covers HTTP methods, request/response handling, streaming, error management, and includes practical examples like a blog API with Prisma and Zod validation. It addresses common needs like authentication and rate limiting.

name: server-actions
author: davepoon
description: This skill should be used when the user asks about "Server Actions", "form handling in Next.js", "mutations", "useFormState", "useFormStatus", "revalidatePath", "revalidateTag", or needs guidance on data mutations and form submissions in Next.js App Router.
description_zh: 详细指导如何在Next.js中使用Server Actions处理表单提交和数据变更。涵盖表单状态管理、Zod验证、缓存重验证模式以及购物车、自动保存等实际案例。提供常见场景的代码示例。
_original_description: Provides detailed guidance on implementing Next.js Server Actions for form submissions and data mutations. Covers form state management, validation with Zod, revalidation patterns, and real-world examples like shopping carts and auto-save. Includes code snippets for common use cases.

name: server-components
author: davepoon
description: This skill should be used when the user asks about "Server Components", "Client Components", "'use client' directive", "when to use server vs client", "RSC patterns", "component composition", "data fetching in components", or needs guidance on React Server Components architecture in Next.js.
description_zh: 该技能详细讲解Next.js App Router中的React服务器组件，涵盖服务器与客户端组件的区别、组合模式、数据获取策略和实际代码示例，帮助开发者理解何时使用哪种组件类型以及如何有效构建应用。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed guidance on React Server Components in Next.js App Router, covering server vs client component distinctions, composition patterns, data fetching strategies, and practical implementation examples. It helps developers understand when to use each component type and how to structure applications effectively.

name: youtube-downloader
author: davepoon
description: Download YouTube videos with customizable quality and format options. Use this skill when the user asks to download, save, or grab YouTube videos. Supports various quality settings (best, 1080p, 720p, 480p, 360p), multiple formats (mp4, webm, mkv), and audio-only downloads as MP3.
description_zh: 一个命令行工具，用于下载YouTube视频，支持质量与格式选择。基于yt-dlp，下载前显示视频信息，支持多种分辨率（1080p至360p）、格式（mp4、webm、mkv）及音频提取为MP3。依赖缺失时会自动安装。
_original_description: A command-line tool that downloads YouTube videos with quality and format options. It uses yt-dlp, provides video info before download, supports multiple resolutions (1080p to 360p), formats (mp4, webm, mkv), and audio-only MP3 extraction. Installation is automatic if dependencies are missing.

name: agent-memory-mcp
author: davila7
description: A hybrid memory system that provides persistent, searchable knowledge management for AI agents (Architecture, Patterns, Decisions).

name: cc-skill-project-guidelines-example
author: davila7
description: Project Guidelines Skill (Example)

name: claude-code-guide
author: davila7
description: Master guide for using Claude Code effectively. Includes configuration templates, prompting strategies "Thinking" keywords, debugging techniques, and best practices for interacting with the agent.

name: context7-auto-research
author: davila7
description: Automatically fetch latest library/framework documentation for Claude Code via Context7 API

name: draw-io
author: davila7
description: draw.io diagram creation, editing, and review. Use for .drawio XML editing, PNG conversion, layout adjustment, and AWS icon usage.

name: gepetto
author: davila7
description: Creates detailed, sectionized implementation plans through research, stakeholder interviews, and multi-LLM review. Use when planning features that need thorough pre-implementation analysis.

name: gh-address-comments
author: davila7
description: Help address review/issue comments on the open GitHub PR for the current branch using gh CLI; verify gh auth first and prompt the user to authenticate if not logged in.

name: ml-paper-writing
author: davila7
description: Write publication-ready ML/AI papers for NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, ACL, AAAI, COLM. Use when drafting papers from research repos, structuring arguments, verifying citations, or preparing camera-ready submissions. Includes LaTeX templates, reviewer guidelines, and citation verification workflows.

name: neuropixels-analysis
author: davila7
description: Neuropixels neural recording analysis. Load SpikeGLX/OpenEphys data, preprocess, motion correction, Kilosort4 spike sorting, quality metrics, Allen/IBL curation, AI-assisted visual analysis, for Neuropixels 1.0/2.0 extracellular electrophysiology. Use when working with neural recordings, spike sorting, extracellular electrophysiology, or when the user mentions Neuropixels, SpikeGLX, Open Ephys, Kilosort, quality metrics, or unit curation.
description_zh: 提供完整的Neuropixels神经电生理数据分析流程，涵盖从加载SpikeGLX/OpenEphys原始数据、预处理、运动校正、Kilosort4尖峰排序、质量指标计算到基于Allen/IBL标准的单元筛选。包含各步骤的具体代码示例，支持Neuropixels 1.0/2.0硬件差异处理。
_original_description: Provides a complete pipeline for analyzing Neuropixels neural recording data, from loading SpikeGLX/OpenEphys files through preprocessing, motion correction, spike sorting with Kilosort4, quality metrics calculation, to unit curation using Allen/IBL standards. Includes specific code examples for each step and handles Neuropixels 1.0/2.0 hardware differences.

name: railway-database
author: davila7
description: Add official Railway database services (Postgres, Redis, MySQL, MongoDB). Use when user wants to add a database, says "add postgres", "add redis", "add database", "connect to database", or "wire up the database". For other templates (Ghost, Strapi, n8n), use the railway-templates skill.

name: railway-environment
author: davila7
description: Query, stage, and apply configuration changes for Railway environments. Use for ANY variable or env var operations, service configuration (source, build settings, deploy settings), lifecycle (delete service), and applying changes. Prefer over railway-status skill for any configuration or variable queries.

name: railway-service
author: davila7
description: Check service status, rename services, change service icons, link services, or create services with Docker images. For creating services with local code, prefer railway-new skill. For GitHub repo sources, use railway-new skill to create empty service then railway-environment skill to configure source.

name: railway-templates
author: davila7
description: Search and deploy services from Railway's template marketplace. Use when user wants to add a service from a template, find templates for a specific use case, or deploy tools like Ghost, Strapi, n8n, Minio, Uptime Kuma, etc. For databases (Postgres, Redis, MySQL, MongoDB), prefer the railway-database skill.

name: roier-seo
author: davila7
description: Technical SEO auditor and fixer. Runs Lighthouse/PageSpeed audits on websites or local dev servers, analyzes SEO/performance/accessibility scores, and automatically implements fixes for meta tags, structured data, Core Web Vitals, and accessibility issues.

name: task-execution-engine
author: davila7
description: Execute implementation tasks from design documents using markdown checkboxes. Use when (1) implementing features from feature-design-assistant output, (2) resuming interrupted work, (3) batch executing tasks. Triggers on 'start implementation', 'run tasks', 'resume'.

name: beads
author: dbmcco
description: Git-backed issue tracker for multi-session work with dependencies and persistent memory across conversation compaction. Use when work spans sessions, has blockers, or needs context recovery after compaction.

name: content-driven-development
author: ddttom
description: Apply a Content Driven Development process to AEM Edge Delivery Services development. Use for all development tasks, including building new blocks, modifying existing blocks, making changes to core decoration functionality, etc.

name: content-modeling
author: ddttom
description: Create effective content models for your blocks that are easy for authors to work with. Use this skill anytime you are building new blocks, making changes to existing blocks that modify the initial structure authors work with.

name: create-presentation
author: ddttom
description: Create or update presentation notebooks with embedded HTML and JavaScript in markdown cells using EDS blocks. Convert executable code cells to informative text. Build presentations, slides, demos, showcases with accordion, cards, tabs, hero, grid, table blocks. No runnable JavaScript cells - only visual markdown with inline scripts for presentation mode.

name: docs-search
author: ddttom
description: Searches the aem.live documentation for information on AEM Edge Delivery Services features. Use this skill when you need more information about a feature, want guidance on how to implement a feature, and using existing tools you have to search the web isn't turning up relevant results.

name: eds-block-development
author: ddttom
description: Guide for developing EDS blocks using vanilla JavaScript, Content Driven Development, and block decoration patterns. Covers block structure, decorate function, content extraction, DOM manipulation, and EDS best practices for Adobe Edge Delivery Services.
description_zh: 提供使用原生JavaScript开发Adobe Edge Delivery Services块的具体指南。涵盖文件结构、Google Docs集成、DOM操作模式和关键的EDS特定约束（如保留类名）。包含内容提取和错误处理的实用代码示例。
_original_description: Provides concrete guidance for developing Adobe Edge Delivery Services blocks using vanilla JavaScript. Covers file structure, Google Docs integration, DOM manipulation patterns, and critical EDS-specific constraints like reserved class names. Includes practical code examples for content extraction and error handling.

name: eds-block-testing
author: ddttom
description: Guide for testing EDS blocks using test.html files and the development server. Covers test file structure, EDS core integration, testing patterns, and debugging workflows for Adobe Edge Delivery Services blocks.

name: eds-performance-debugging
author: ddttom
description: Guide for debugging and performance optimization of EDS blocks including error handling, FOUC prevention, Core Web Vitals optimization, and debugging workflows for Adobe Edge Delivery Services.

name: ipynb-validator
author: ddttom
description: Validate Jupyter notebooks (.ipynb files) for production readiness. Checks smart links consistency, layout structure, transition cells with action cards, numbered part flow, cell ordering, and overall quality. Use when validating notebooks, checking notebook structure, testing smart links, verifying action cards, or preparing notebooks for production deployment. Keywords include ipynb validation, notebook structure, smart links, action cards, transitions, part flow, production ready.

name: jupyter-educational-notebook
author: ddttom
description: Create educational and interactive Jupyter notebooks as SPAs that explain concepts, teach topics, create tutorials, illustrate ideas from text, or build blog posts. Use for interactive guides, demonstrations, explanations, documentation, or any content meant for end users and learners displayed via ipynb-viewer block. Keywords include educational notebook, tutorial notebook, interactive guide, blog notebook, SPA notebook, explain topic, illustrate concept, teach interactively.

name: jupyter-notebook-testing
author: ddttom
description: Create and manage Jupyter notebooks for testing Adobe Edge Delivery Services (EDS) blocks interactively in the browser using the ipynb-viewer block. Interactive JavaScript execution, overlay previews with backdrop, direct ES6 imports. Use when creating notebooks, testing blocks with ipynb files in browser, generating overlay previews, or creating executable documentation.

name: tanstack-integration-best-practices
author: deckardger
description: Best practices for integrating TanStack Query with TanStack Router and TanStack Start. Patterns for full-stack data flow, SSR, and caching coordination.
description_zh: 提供整合 TanStack Query、Router 和 Start 的最佳实践，以确保全栈 Web 应用中的数据流、缓存、SSR 和类型安全达到最优。

name: tanstack-query-best-practices
author: deckardger
description: TanStack Query (React Query) best practices for data fetching, caching, mutations, and server state management. Activate when building data-driven React applications with server state.
description_zh: 提供在React应用中实施TanStack Query（React Query）的最佳实践指南，涵盖数据获取、缓存、变更和服务器状态管理，以优化性能和确保数据一致性。

name: tanstack-router-best-practices
author: deckardger
description: TanStack Router best practices for type-safe routing, data loading, search params, and navigation. Activate when building React applications with complex routing needs.
description_zh: 针对React应用中TanStack Router的最佳实践指南，专注于类型安全路由、数据加载、搜索参数处理和导航优化，适用于复杂路由场景。

name: tanstack-start-best-practices
author: deckardger
description: TanStack Start best practices for full-stack React applications. Server functions, middleware, SSR, authentication, and deployment patterns. Activate when building full-stack apps with TanStack Start.
description_zh: 提供使用 TanStack Start 构建全栈 React 应用的最佳实践指南，涵盖服务端函数、中间件、SSR、身份验证和部署模式。

name: edgartools
author: dgunning
description: Query and analyze SEC filings using EdgarTools
_original_description: Query and analyze SEC filings and financial statements using EdgarTools. Get company data, filings, XBRL financials, and perform multi-company analysis.

description: Set up AWS SES for receiving inbound emails with SNS webhook delivery
description_zh: 一份详细的AWS SES入站邮件处理配置指南，提供清晰的步骤说明和故障排除指导，适合需要邮件自动化处理的开发者。
_original_description: A comprehensive guide for setting up AWS SES inbound email processing with SNS webhook delivery, providing clear step-by-step instructions and troubleshooting guidance.

name: linkedin-post
author: different-ai
description: Draft high-performing LinkedIn posts using learnings from tweet performance data and 0 Finance messaging guidelines
description_zh: 该技能利用Twitter推文表现数据，为专业受众起草LinkedIn帖子。它提供具体模板、金融内容合规指南，以及将推文模式转化为有效LinkedIn内容的清晰流程，包括语气调整。
_original_description: This skill drafts LinkedIn posts by applying data-driven insights from Twitter performance analytics, adapting them for a professional audience. It provides specific templates, compliance guidelines for financial messaging, and a clear process to transform tweet patterns into effective LinkedIn content with proper tone adjustments.

name: opencode-bridge
author: different-ai
description: Bridge between OpenWork UI and OpenCode runtime

name: opencode-mirror
author: different-ai
description: Maintain the local OpenCode mirror for self-reference

name: opencode-primitives
author: different-ai
description: Reference OpenCode docs when implementing skills, plugins, MCPs, or config-driven behavior.

name: openwork-core
author: different-ai
description: Core context and guardrails for OpenWork native app

name: self-improve
author: different-ai
description: Update skill documentation and extend OpenCode capabilities based on learnings
description_zh: 一个先进的元技能，使AI代理能够根据实际使用模式，通过文档更新和系统扩展来自主改进自身能力。
_original_description: A sophisticated meta-skill that enables AI agents to autonomously improve their own capabilities through documentation updates and system extensions based on real-world usage patterns.

name: skill-reinforcement
author: different-ai
description: Always and Automatically improve skills after each use by capturing learnings and anti-patterns
description_zh: 一个元技能，在任何技能使用后自动触发，用于捕获学习成果、识别反模式并更新技能文档。它提供结构化模板来记录快捷方式、故障模式和流程改进，防止会话间的知识丢失。
_original_description: A meta-skill that automatically triggers after any skill use to capture learnings, identify anti-patterns, and update skill documentation. It provides structured templates for documenting shortcuts, failure modes, and workflow improvements to prevent knowledge loss between sessions.

name: solidjs-patterns
author: different-ai
description: SolidJS reactivity + UI state patterns for OpenWork

name: tauri-solidjs
author: different-ai
description: Tauri 2.x + SolidJS stack for OpenWork native app

name: test-staging-branch
author: different-ai
description: Test feature branches on Vercel preview deployments using Chrome automation and Gmail OTP
description_zh: 一份使用Chrome自动化工具和Gmail OTP登录对Vercel预览部署进行端到端测试的详细指南，包含令牌效率优化和安全最佳实践。
_original_description: A comprehensive guide for automated end-to-end testing of Vercel preview deployments using Chrome automation with Gmail OTP login, featuring token-efficient patterns and security best practices.

name: testability
author: different-ai
description: Make features testable by design. Testing pyramid from fast (local) to slow (UI). Expose APIs securely for testing.
description_zh: 该技能为Web开发提供分层测试金字塔的实践指南。涵盖单元测试、集成测试和端到端测试，包含tRPC、数据库模拟和Playwright的具体TypeScript示例。核心是倡导从设计之初就考虑可测试性，提供了依赖注入和纯函数提取等模式。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured guide for implementing a testing pyramid in web development. It covers unit, integration, and E2E testing with concrete TypeScript examples for tRPC, database mocking, and Playwright. It emphasizes designing for testability from the start, including dependency injection and pure function extraction patterns.

name: tweet-rl-tracker
author: different-ai
description: Create and manage a Notion-based tweet performance tracking system for "poor man's reinforcement learning"
description_zh: 一个设计良好的基于Notion的推文性能追踪系统，采用结构化强化学习方法，具有清晰的工作流程和可操作的见解。
_original_description: A well-designed Notion-based system for tracking tweet performance using a structured reinforcement learning approach with clear workflows and actionable insights.

name: vercel-dns
author: different-ai
description: Manage DNS records for domains hosted on Vercel using the Vercel CLI
description_zh: 提供管理Vercel托管域名DNS记录的CLI命令，包括列出、添加和删除记录。包含邮件设置（MX、SPF、DKIM）的具体示例和团队/权限问题的故障排除指导。
_original_description: Provides CLI commands to manage DNS records for Vercel-hosted domains, including listing, adding, and removing records. Includes specific examples for email setup (MX, SPF, DKIM) and troubleshooting guidance for team/permission issues.

name: video-subtitle-cutter
author: different-ai
description: Transcribe video, analyze subtitles with AI, and cut video by removing filler words, pauses, and mistakes
description_zh: 一款强大的AI视频编辑工具，通过语音转录和智能分析，自动去除视频中的填充词和停顿。
_original_description: A powerful AI-powered video editing tool that automates the removal of filler words and pauses from videos using speech transcription and intelligent analysis.

name: youtube-rl-tracker
author: different-ai
description: Track YouTube video performance for "poor man's reinforcement learning" - learn what thumbnails, titles, and hooks work
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个结构化的Notion模板和方法论，用于追踪YouTube视频表现。它帮助创作者系统性地测试缩略图样式、标题钩子和内容模式，基于实际数据识别哪些因素能提升观看量和互动。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured Notion template and methodology for tracking YouTube video performance. It helps creators systematically test thumbnail styles, title hooks, and content patterns to identify what drives views and engagement based on actual data.

name: auditing-dependencies
author: djankies
description: Auditing and updating npm dependencies to prevent security vulnerabilities in TypeScript projects

name: avoiding-any-types
author: djankies
description: Teaches when and how to use unknown instead of any type in TypeScript. Use when working with TypeScript code that has any types, needs type safety, handling external data, or when designing APIs. Critical for preventing type safety violations.

name: avoiding-non-null-assertions
author: djankies
description: Avoid non-null assertion operator (!) and use type-safe alternatives instead

name: composing-components
author: djankies
description: Teaches component composition patterns in React 19 including children prop, compound components, and render props. Use when designing component APIs, creating reusable components, or avoiding prop drilling.

name: configuring-image-optimization
author: djankies
description: Teach image optimization configuration changes in Next.js 16. Use when configuring images, troubleshooting image loading, or migrating image settings.

name: configuring-serverless-clients
author: djankies
description: Configure PrismaClient for serverless (Next.js, Lambda, Vercel) with connection_limit=1 and global singleton pattern.

name: configuring-tailwind-v4
author: djankies
description: Configure Tailwind CSS v4 using Vite plugin, PostCSS, or CLI with CSS-first configuration via @import and @theme directives. Use when setting up new projects or migrating build tools.

name: configuring-transaction-isolation
author: djankies
description: Configure transaction isolation levels to prevent race conditions and handle concurrent access. Use when dealing with concurrent updates, financial operations, inventory management, or when users mention race conditions, dirty reads, phantom reads, or concurrent modifications.
